subcodes.first_line: The purpose underlying the creation of the world and the fashioning of man hath been none other than the recognition of God, exalted be His glory, and this recognition is, in itself, the pure wine [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: مقصود از خلق عالم و تصویر آدم عرفان حق جل جلاله بوده و این عرفان بنفسه رحیق
subcodes.subjects: @knowledge; recognition of God, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @justice and wrath of God, @purpose; goal of creation, @spiritual transformation
